title: Amazon Basics Stainless Steel Dinner Knives With Round Edge, Pack of 12, Silver
features: 12 dinner knives for adding to an existing set or for catering special events
Made of stainless steel for utility and strength
Elegant style with beautiful round-edge handle shape
Suitable for dishwasher for easy cleaning
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics Kitchen Collection AmazonBasics Dinner Knives, Pack of 12 A lovely addition to an existing flatware set at home or for catering special events, the Amazon Basics Dinner Spoons, Pack of 12 makes a beautiful impression at any table setting or buffet. The pack of 12 helps ensure each guest has a clean spoon, and with a few extras on hand, there’s no need to hand wash utensils half way through a dinner party. Dishwasher Safe The Amazon Basics flatware ensures time saving convenience when it comes to cleaning. Simply rinse and place in the dishwasher, and it’s good to go. Details 12 dinner knives Made of stainless steel for affordable utility and strength Elegant, modern style Dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning Stainless Steel Made of stainless steel, the flatware provides long-lasting performance and stands up to frequent washings. Suitable for everyday use or special occasions, the stainless-steel flatware offers eye-catching good looks, whether setting a table for brunch or dinner with friends. Suit Your Style The flatware is available in a variety of beautifully-edged handles for elegant style. The gently curved contours at the base of the handle create a welcoming aesthetic conducive to any meal throughout the day and to any casual or elegant table setting. Highlight the design with cloth napkins or a colorful tablecloth for a well-coordinated effect (linens sold separately).
